tool_args.label: LIRR & Metro-North Key Performance Metrics - April 2025
tool_args.raw_text: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS • April 2025 • mta.info • This performance metrics document was prepared for the April 2025 meeting of the Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees. • April 28, 2025

payload.title: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
payload.prepared_for: Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Rob Free, President, Long Island Rail Road
tool_args.raw_text: Rob Free President, Long Island Rail Road

tool_args.label: Justin Vonashek, President, Metro-North Railroad
tool_args.raw_text: Justin Vonashek President, Metro-North Railroad

tool_args.label: Long Island Rail Road
tool_args.raw_text: Long Island Rail Road is comprised of over 7,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 125 stations, nearly 700 miles of track, and 27 shops and yards.

payload.description: Long Island Rail Road is comprised of over 7,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 125 stations, nearly 700 miles of track, and 27 shops and yards.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Railroad
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North Railroad is comprised of nearly 6,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards.

payload.description: Metro-North Railroad is comprised of nearly 6,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards.

tool_args.label: Metropolitan Transportation Authority
tool_args.raw_text: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority is North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

payload.description: North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

tool_args.label: New Yaphank Station
tool_args.raw_text: ground on the new Yaphank Station... moving the existing station some three miles to the east... our own railroad forces will be handling all of the construction... opening sometime next year

payload.description: New LIRR station in Yaphank, moving the existing station some three miles to the east near the William Floyd Parkway, with access to L.I.E., 25A and Sunrise Highway. LIRR forces will handle construction of station platforms, shelters, ADA ramp, signage, etc. Opens sometime next year.

tool_args.label: Jamaica Capacity Improvements (JCI)
tool_args.raw_text: Jamaica Capacity Improvements (JCI) Program. Expanding Hall Interlocking is an important step in improving service through Jamaica, as it will create two new parallel routes east of Jamaica Station. JCI consists of several stages of improvements with the goal of increasing overall LIRR capacity, reducing travel time through Jamaica, standardizing infrastructure, and bringing the Jamaica complex to a state of good repair.

payload.description: Multi-phase program to increase overall LIRR capacity, reduce travel time through Jamaica, standardize infrastructure, and bring the Jamaica complex to a state of good repair. Includes Hall Interlocking Expansion creating two new parallel routes east of Jamaica Station.

tool_args.label: Hall Interlocking Expansion
tool_args.raw_text: Expanding Hall Interlocking is an important step in improving service through Jamaica, as it will create two new parallel routes east of Jamaica Station. The project team is constructing a new 280-foot two-track railroad bridge over 150 Street and Atlantic Branch Track 1 using innovative bridge launching techniques. The two newly extended tracks will eventually become Montauk Branch Track 2 and Main Line Track 2.

payload.description: Part of the multi-phase Jamaica Capacity Improvements Program. Constructing a new 280-foot two-track railroad bridge over 150 Street and Atlantic Branch Track 1 using innovative bridge launching techniques. Will create two new parallel routes east of Jamaica Station, eventually becoming Montauk Branch Track 2 and Main Line Track 2.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Terminal Train Shed Repairs
tool_args.raw_text: Construction & Development continues to work on replacing the deck structure for the Grand Central Terminal Train Shed... The roof is being replaced in sections... Sector 1 is currently under construction, with the project focusing on the complete replacement of approximately 70,000 square feet over the Upper Level of the Train Shed.

payload.project_name: Grand Central Terminal Train Shed Repairs
payload.description: Replacing the deck structure for the Grand Central Terminal Train Shed (railroad yard north of Grand Central Terminal). The roof supports roadways and sidewalks that make up Park Avenue between East 43 and East 57 St and cross streets between Lexington and Madison Avenue. Sector 1 is under construction, focusing on complete replacement of approximately 70,000 square feet over the Upper Level of the Train Shed.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Hudson Line Climate Resilience Blueprint
tool_args.raw_text: MTA is developing the Metro-North Hudson Line Climate Resilience Blueprint that will rebuild critical infrastructure, including culverts, drainage, retaining walls, slopes, shorelines, and track, with attention focused on a 20-mile stretch between Riverdale and Croton-Harmon that is vulnerable to the impacts of extreme weather.

payload.project_name: Metro-North Hudson Line Climate Resilience Blueprint
payload.description: Will rebuild critical infrastructure, including culverts, drainage, retaining walls, slopes, shorelines, and track, with attention focused on a 20-mile stretch between Riverdale and Croton-Harmon that is vulnerable to the impacts of extreme weather.

tool_args.label: LIRR March 2025 ridership increase vs March 2024
tool_args.raw_text: March 2025 ridership increased 10.4% compared to March 2024

tool_args.label: LIRR March 2025 ridership as percentage of March 2019
tool_args.raw_text: 87.6% of March 2019, the highest post-pandemic percentage we've reached

tool_args.label: LIRR March 2025 on-time performance
tool_args.raw_text: second best March total OTP ever (96.16%)

tool_args.label: LIRR off-peak on-time performance March 2025
tool_args.raw_text: highest off-peak total (96.74%) for a March in our recorded history

tool_args.label: LIRR riders to Mets Opening Day 2025
tool_args.raw_text: we transported 7,190 fans to see the Mets beat the Blue Jays, shattering the old record for an opening day

payload.description: Mets Opening Day at Citi Field

tool_args.label: LIRR March 2025 monthly ridership
tool_args.raw_text: March 2025 6.5 million trips

tool_args.label: Metro-North March 2025 total ridership
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North's total March 2025 ridership of 5.8 million

tool_args.label: Metro-North March 2025 ridership increase vs March 2024
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North's total ridership in March increased 8.1% compared to March 2024

tool_args.label: Metro-North March 2025 ridership as % of March 2019
tool_args.raw_text: represents 81.1% of March 2019 ridership

tool_args.label: Metro-North March 2025 systemwide OTP
tool_args.raw_text: Systemwide on-time performance (OTP) exceeded the 94% goal, reaching 98.7%

tool_args.label: Metro-North fleet mean distance between failures February 2025
tool_args.raw_text: The fleet's mean distance between failures (MDBF) was 355,996 miles, surpassing the 200,000-mile goal.

tool_args.label: Yaphank Station Groundbreaking
tool_args.raw_text: On the soggy morning of April 3rd, I joined MTA Chair & CEO Janno Lieber, Construction and Development President Jamie Torres-Springer and other local officials to break ground on the new Yaphank Station.

tool_args.label: LIRR Summer Timetable 2025
tool_args.raw_text: On May 19th, our annual summer timetables will take effect to enhance service for the warm weather months and support a number of track and station projects.

payload.description: LIRR annual summer timetables take effect

tool_args.label: LIRR Pre-Boarding Ticket Validation at Penn Station
tool_args.raw_text: In 2024 our pre-boarding ticket validation program at Penn Station resulted in 674,000 fares collected over 203 days and that success has led to the program extended to occur every Monday through Friday in Penn.

payload.description: Pre-boarding ticket validation program at Penn Station extended to every Monday through Friday

tool_args.label: Lakeview Station Spring Clean-Up
tool_args.raw_text: We were thrilled to have been able to support Saturday, April 12th's Spring Clean Up, hosted by the Lakeview Civic Association at the Lakeview Station

payload.description: Spring clean-up at Lakeview Station supported by LIRR

tool_args.label: Emergency Exercise at Grand Central Madison
tool_args.raw_text: On April 5, the New York State Division of Homeland Security, New York State Police, MTA PD, NYPD, other law enforcement agencies along with the LIRR successfully conducted an emergency exercise at Grand Central Madison.

payload.description: Emergency exercise at Grand Central Madison with multiple law enforcement agencies

tool_args.label: Metro-North Memorial Day Getaway Trains
tool_args.raw_text: To kick off the Memorial Day weekend, on Friday, May 23rd, MNR will operate its regular getaway trains on all three lines.

payload.description: Metro-North will operate regular getaway trains on all three lines for Memorial Day weekend

tool_args.label: Metro-North Restroom QR Code Feedback Program
tool_args.raw_text: Since its rollout in September 2024, the initiative has proven to be a valuable tool... In the first seven months, we received 662 reports and closed out 2024 with more commendations (221) than complaints (213).

payload.description: Metro-North Restroom QR Code Feedback Program launched

tool_args.label: Metro-North Seasonal Safety Focus Days - Spring
tool_args.raw_text: On May 1, Spring will focus on 'Prepared to Perform,' with topics that include weather hazards, mental fatigue, slip, trip, fall prevention, and PPE compliance.

payload.description: Metro-North Seasonal Safety Focus Days launch with Spring theme 'Prepared to Perform'

tool_args.label: Metro-North fare collection rate 2024
tool_args.raw_text: 97.4% of fares collected in 2024

tool_args.label: Metro-North fare collection rate Q1 2025
tool_args.raw_text: 97% recorded in the first quarter of 2025

tool_args.label: Poughkeepsie station CO2 reduction from boiler conversion
tool_args.raw_text: converting our boiler system from oil to cleaner-burning natural gas is expected to eliminate 249 tons of CO2 emissions annually

payload.description: Expected elimination of CO2 emissions from converting boiler from oil to natural gas

tool_args.label: LIRR March 2025 OTP 96.2%
tool_args.raw_text: In March, OTP was 96.2% and year-to-date OTP was 96.5%, both above goal.

tool_args.label: LIRR fleet MDBF February 2025
tool_args.raw_text: The fleet mean distance between failures... operated at 173,101 miles in February, exceeding the target of 150,000 miles.

tool_args.label: Siemens Charger NOx emission reduction
tool_args.raw_text: The Chargers will reduce Nitrogen Oxide emissions by 84%

payload.description: Reduction in Nitrogen Oxide emissions

tool_args.label: Siemens Charger Particulate Matter reduction
tool_args.raw_text: Particulate Matter by 86%

payload.description: Reduction in Particulate Matter emissions

tool_args.label: Siemens Charger annual CO2 reduction
tool_args.raw_text: eliminate over 25,000 metric tons of carbon emissions annually

payload.description: Annual elimination of carbon emissions

tool_args.label: Metro-North energy usage 10% below 2015 benchmark
tool_args.raw_text: our total annual energy usage remains 10% below our 2015 benchmark

tool_args.label: LIRR farebox revenue variance March YTD 2025
tool_args.raw_text: farebox revenue was $9.1 million higher than the budget

tool_args.label: LIRR total non-reimbursable revenues March YTD 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Total Non-Reimbursable Revenues Budget $153.5 Actual $168.7 Variance $15.2

tool_args.label: Metro-North farebox revenue variance March YTD 2025
tool_args.raw_text: farebox revenue was $2.2 million higher than the Budget

tool_args.label: Metro-North total non-reimbursable revenues March YTD 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Total Non-Reimbursable Revenues Budget $153.2 Actual $161.9 Variance $8.7

tool_args.label: LIRR commutation ridership increase March 2025 vs March 2024
tool_args.raw_text: Commutation ridership increased 10.6%

tool_args.label: LIRR non-commutation ridership increase March 2025 vs March 2024
tool_args.raw_text: Non-Commutation increased 10.2%

tool_args.label: LIRR Grand Central Madison ridership March 2025
tool_args.raw_text: GCM ridership reached 1,640,690 customers (based on load weigh data), which is the highest YTD 2025 and 4th highest since the opening of GCM.

tool_args.label: LIRR year-to-date ridership increase 2025 vs 2024
tool_args.raw_text: Year-to-date, ridership is 9.4% above 2024, representing 86.0% of the ridership compared to the same period in 2019.

tool_args.label: LIRR summer service enhancements 2025
tool_args.raw_text: The 5:13 PM train from Penn Station to Speonk, which normally operates to Montauk on summer Thursdays and Fridays, will now operate to Montauk, Monday through Friday, throughout the summer. Two new early morning revenue trains will operate from Jamaica to Grand Central Madison on weekdays. The 7:44 PM train from Penn Station to Long Beach will make an added stop at Lynbrook. Two weekend Montauk Branch trains that normally terminate in Jamaica will instead operate through to Penn Station on Sundays or holidays.

payload.claim_text: LIRR added summer service enhancements including extended Montauk service, new early morning Jamaica to GCM trains, an added stop at Lynbrook, and weekend Montauk Branch through-service to Penn Station.

tool_args.label: LIRR fare evasion decline since 2023
tool_args.raw_text: there has been a steady year-over-year decline since 2023 in percentage of total revenue lost to fare evasion - and climb in the percentage of non-commutation fares collected.

payload.claim_text: Steady year-over-year decline since 2023 in percentage of total revenue lost to fare evasion on LIRR, with a climb in non-commutation fares collected.

tool_args.label: Metro-North fare evasion enforcement increase
tool_args.raw_text: Enforcement efforts have also been bolstered through improved coordination with the MTA Police Department, resulting in a 161% increase in summons issuances and an 89% rise in arrests compared to the previous year.

payload.claim_text: Metro-North fare enforcement saw a 161% increase in summons issuances and an 89% rise in arrests compared to the previous year.
